creator: kraileth@elderlinux.org
text:
Thanks for bringing this up again, Muhammad! The expiration date for security/teleport was set on my request when security/teleport5 hit the tree. It is completely superseded by the newer port and only remained in there for 2023Q1, so it is meant to go.

I had hoped to at have at least security/teleport6 ready by now and to request expiration for version 5 in 3 months, but I'm struggling with the port for the next version. Upstream seems to have split out parts of the formerly monolithic application and teleport 6 fails to build due to missing modules.

Guess I need to set aside some more time to re-read the go section in the porters manual. If that doesn't work out, I'll probably have to ask for help.
